title: LinkedIn is searching your browser extensions
author: digitalWestie
aiHeadline: LinkedIn's latest privacy invasion: now scanning your browser extensions for fun and profit, because who needs actual consent when you can just snoop?

title: Google releases Gemma 4 open models
author: jeffmcjunkin
aiHeadline: Google's latest AI marvel, Gemma 4, because why have just one AI model when you can have a whole family? Now you can enjoy the same level of eeriness with even more layers of opacity!

title: Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom
author: novaRom
aiHeadline: Sweden takes a bold step backward in education by swapping screens for books, proving that sometimes the best way to innovate is to just... not innovate at all.

title: Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March
author: hkmaxpro
aiHeadline: Steam on Linux usage hits a whopping 5% in March, because who needs a dominant market share when you can have a niche that's just barely noticeable?

title: Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU
author: AbuAssar
aiHeadline: AMD's Lemonade: the latest in open-source AI servers, because who needs proprietary software when you can have a refreshing glass of 'we told you so' from the underdog?
